steps.title: Find the key tension
steps.content: The passage describes a genome that is the largest known and carries high biological costs. Evolutionary logic predicts such a costly trait would be replaced by a more efficient alternative.

steps.title: Match the answer to the logic
steps.content:
”Superseded” (replaced or succeeded by) directly completes this.

Despite extreme costs, this genome is unlikely to be superseded—meaning evolution hasn't favored replacing it with a smaller, more efficient genome.

The other choices don't address this dynamic: “protracted” (prolonged) is irrelevant to evolutionary replacement, “curtailed” (reduced) doesn't capture the competitive pressure, and “obviated” (made unnecessary) doesn't fit the context.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
